title: Remodeled Doors 3D
description: Makes all the doors and trapdoors have 3D models. Changes the model and the item within the GUI.
body:
![title](https://i.postimg.cc/3NS3qMb0/title-remodeleddoors.png)
Every door has a 3D model and all icons are updated to also be 3D. The new models has proper textures for all sides, using the vanilla textures where possible. ## Mod support Version 2.2+ supports **[Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild)** and version 2.0+ supports **[Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)**, making every door have a unique 3D model. ![Biomes O'Plenty](https://i.postimg.cc/2y4DJqvx/biomes.png)
## Vanilla Minecraft Every door from Vanilla Minecraft has a unique 3D model, including all trapdoors. ![All doors model](https://i.postimg.cc/zf2CMnZG/2025-04-03-22-58-39.png) Included in the pack are updated icons for doors so that they use the 3D model instead of the vanilla 2D icon. ![Icons](https://i.postimg.cc/cJL7XFzz/2025-04-03-22-48-37.png)
If you have any feedback or any questions, the best place to reach me is on the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/Gf7uPVPHZh) ![Discord](https://i.postimg.cc/mr9yt5k9/discord.png)
